---
title: "Welcome to THK-AI Research Cluster"
lang: en
---

[Deutsche Version](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .hero-btn}

:::{.landing-hero}
:::{.columns .v-center}
:::{.column width="48%"}
![](figures/logos/THK-AI-Absenderkennung-EN.png){.hero-logo}

## The central contact point for AI at TH Koln

The THK-AI Research Cluster promotes and supports collaborative projects between associations, industry partners, professors, and students.

[News](news.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .hero-btn}
[Explore Research](forschung.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light .hero-btn}
[Meet the Team](members.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light .hero-btn}
:::

:::{.column width="52%"}
![](figures/hpc/TH-KIplus_Monika%20Probst.jpg){.hero-image fig-alt="THK-AI research context"}
:::
:::
:::

## Members

:::{.columns .v-center}
:::{.column width="60%"}
::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Collaboration
With more than 20 professors from all TH Koln faculties, the THK-AI Research Cluster is one of the largest AI research collaborations at a German university of applied sciences.
:::
:::

:::{.column width="40%"}

![Founding members](figures/members/founding_members_low.png){.team-mosaic fig-alt="Founding members of the THK-AI Cluster"}
:::
:::


## Why THK-AI?

:::{.feature-grid}
:::{.feature-card}
### Applied AI at scale

THK-AI combines modern compute infrastructure and interdisciplinary expertise to accelerate applied AI from prototype to deployment.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### Open for collaboration

The cluster supports cooperative projects between associations, companies, professors, and students across disciplines.
:::

:::{.feature-card}
### Strong infrastructure

A distributed high-performance setup in Gummersbach and Leverkusen enables resilient research workflows and 24/7 web access.
:::
:::

## THK-AI Example Project

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The project **THK-KIplus** (TH Koln - Kunstliche Intelligenz plus) was funded from June 2023 to November 2025 in the federal program **KI-Nachwuchs@FH** by the Federal Ministry for Research, Technology and Space.

The initiative received funding of **around EUR 1.3 million** and established one of the strongest AI-oriented research infrastructures at German universities of applied sciences.
:::

## Focus areas

:::{.columns}
:::{.column width="33%"}
### Mobility

Robust AI methods for autonomous and safety-critical systems.
:::

:::{.column width="33%"}
### Sustainability

Data-driven environmental monitoring and ecological decision support.
:::

:::{.column width="33%"}
### Society and transfer

Responsible AI for education, social contexts, and industry collaboration.
:::
:::

## CAIRNE Gold Member

:::{.columns .v-center}
:::{.column width="36%"}
![](figures/logos/Outlook-2d2n4pxp.png){fig-alt="CAIRNE logo" width="100%"}
:::
:::{.column width="64%"}
::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
THK-AI is a **Gold Member** of the **CAIRNE Research Network** (Confederation of Laboratories for Artificial Intelligence Research in Europe).
:::

CAIRNE is a European non-profit AI community with a human-centred focus. It connects research institutions, industry, and policy stakeholders to strengthen AI excellence, collaboration, and digital sovereignty across Europe.

[Learn more about CAIRNE](https://cairne.eu){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Read more about THK-AI](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

## Join and connect

If you are looking for collaboration, student projects, or applied AI research partnerships, THK-AI is your central contact point at TH Koln.

[Contact and About](about.qmd){.btn .btn-success}
[Teaching Activities](lehre.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
